About

Currently second year PhD student at INRIA Paris, MATHNET Team, in probability and more specifically in stochastic geometry. I'm currently one of the organizers of the MATHNET Seminar (feel free to contact me for this!).

Detailed CV

At a glance

Education

  • I went throught the French "prépa" system, and graduated from the ENS de Lyon.
  • Did my master's degree in Probability in Orsay (Université Paris-Saclay), and some research internships before starting a PhD at INRIA Paris under the direction of François Baccelli and Raphaël Lachièze-Rey.

    Topics

  • Fundamental math background, with internships mostly on stat mech models (percolation, spin models).
  • Thesis on "Modeling of Large Communication Networks" at INRIA Paris.
